ORDER RE: STIPULATED PROTECTIVE ORDER.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-18-2018 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS EDMOND KRAFCHOW, MASON-MCDUFFIE REAL ESTATE, INC.'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS SHALL NOTIFY AFFECTED THIRD PARTIES TO PROVIDE AN OPPORTUNITY TO OBJECT BEFORE PRODUCING THE LIEN RELEASES AND SHALL PRODUCE THE LIEN RELEASES IF NO OBJECTION IS MADE WITHIN 20 DAYS' NOTICE. IF PRODUCED, THEN THE LIEN RELEASES SHALL BE MARKED 'CONFIDENTIAL' PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' PROTECTIVE ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC3.1312 AND SUBMIT BY EMAIL TO JUDGE PRO TEM ARRON MINIS AT AARON@MINNISANDSMALLETS.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON MINNIS; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-15-2019 Continued To Nov-18-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendants' Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Oct-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS EDMOND KRAFCHOW, MASON-MCDUFFIE REAL ESTATE, INC.'S Motion For Protective Order

Granted. Defendants shall notify affected third parties to provide an opportunity to object before producing the lien releases and shall produce the lien releases if no objection is made within 20 days' notice. If produced, then the lien releases shall be marked 'confidential' pursuant to the parties' protective order. Prevailing party to prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312 and submit by email to Judge Pro Tem Arron Minis at aaron@minnisandsmallets.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Set For Trial On Mar-04-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
